about.bio: I am a passionate creator who lives at the intersection of design and technology. My journey began with a simple curiosity about how pixels and code come together to create meaning. Today, I help companies and startups turn their vision into tangible digital realities. Whether it's a complex web application or a brand identity, I bring a meticulous eye for detail and a focus on user-centric results.

projects.title: Nova Dashboard
projects.description: A comprehensive dashboard for monitoring cloud infrastructure.

projects.title: Lumina App
projects.description: An AI-powered application for smart home automation.
